commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: Brotherly love is useless unless it is mutual. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: You should love one another because you are brothers and have been born from the same spiritual womb. … There is nothing which makes friends so much as the earnest endeavor to overcome one’s neighbor by honoring him.

commentaries.author: Polycarp of Smyrna
commentaries.content: “Stand fast therefore in these things and follow the example of the Lord,” being firm in the faith and immovable, in love of the brotherhood kindly affectioned to one another, “partners with the truth,” forestalling one another “in the gentleness of the Lord,” despising no one.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: : "Be kindly affectioned one to another with brotherly love."

commentaries.author: The Apostolic Constitutions
commentaries.content: I have fulfilled the word of peace. For I have taught that in honour they should prefer one another.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
